name: Web Search Plus
description: One clean set of web tools for multi-provider search, extraction, and optional beta answer synthesis. Supports Serper/Google, Brave, Tavily, Exa, Querit, Linkup, Firecrawl, Perplexity via direct API or Kilo gateway, You.com, and SearXNG.

serperApiKey.description: Serper API key for Google-style web search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

braveApiKey.description: Brave Search API key for general web, current, and shopping-style search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

tavilyApiKey.description: Tavily API key for research-oriented search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

linkupApiKey.description: Linkup API key for source-grounded search with citations, references, and evidence-focused queries. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

queritApiKey.description: Querit API key for multilingual AI search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

exaApiKey.description: Exa API key for neural, deep, and deep-reasoning search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

firecrawlApiKey.description: Firecrawl API key for web search with optional page extraction metadata and Google-style recency/domain filtering. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

perplexityApiKey.description: Perplexity API key for answer-style search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

kilocodeApiKey.description: Kilo gateway API key for answer-style search via the Perplexity-compatible gateway route used by this plugin. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

youApiKey.description: You.com API key for general web and answer-oriented search. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

searxngInstanceUrl.description: Base URL for a SearXNG instance. Optional individually, but at least one provider setting in this plugin must be configured.

searxngAllowPrivate.description: Optional danger flag. When true, disables SearXNG SSRF/private-network protection and should only be used on fully trusted private networks.

enableWebAnswer.description: Optional beta toggle for web_answer_plus. Leave off unless you want answer synthesis in addition to web_search_plus and web_extract_plus.

routingConfigPath.description: Optional override path for the persistent routing preferences JSON file used by web_routing_config_plus. Defaults to config/routing-preferences.json inside the plugin directory.

kilocodeApiKey.label: Kilo Gateway API Key
kilocodeApiKey.description: Alternative Perplexity-compatible gateway used by this plugin for answer-style web search via api.kilo.ai/api/gateway/chat/completions.

searxngInstanceUrl.label: SearXNG Instance URL
searxngInstanceUrl.description: Self-hosted metasearch instance URL. Counts as a configured provider even without an API key.

searxngAllowPrivate.label: Allow private-network SearXNG (danger)
searxngAllowPrivate.description: Disables SearXNG SSRF/private-network protection. Only enable on fully trusted private networks.

enableWebAnswer.label: Enable web_answer_plus (beta)
enableWebAnswer.description: Turns on the optional beta answer-synthesis tool. Prefer web_search_plus for live/current info and raw source discovery.

routingConfigPath.label: Routing preferences JSON path
routingConfigPath.description: Optional override for persistent routing behavior. Secrets remain in plugin config; behavior lives in this JSON file.
